llm_outputs.input_summary: Business description with specific acts (Losers Cirque, Duo React, Duo Elevate), reference clients (Microsoft, Skoda, O2, Mercedes-Benz, CSOB), and service offerings
llm_outputs.output_summary: Updated 4 strategy sections (Executive Summary, Value Proposition, Competitive Positioning, Messaging Framework) with specific company details. Added reference clients, flagship acts, and service model throughout.
llm_outputs.raw_output: [Strategy sections updated in-place -- see strategy document]
llm_outputs.notes: Significant improvement over baseline-001: auto-executed tools without re-prompting, completed in single turn. Still no web_search to research unitedarts.cz. Good personalization with specific company details. Proactive next-step suggestion.

steps.notes: Major improvement: AI auto-executed tools (BL-150 fix) and completed update in single turn (1 user message). Strategy was updated rather than regenerated since it already existed from baseline-001. No web_search used (BL-137 still missing). Proactive next-step suggestion to move to Contacts phase.

llm_outputs.input_summary: ICP extraction triggered via button click
llm_outputs.output_summary: 3 strategic clarification questions: (1) Are reference clients direct or agency referrals? (2) Should outreach weight Creative Directors 60/40? (3) Prioritize Germany in DACH?
llm_outputs.raw_output:
1. Your 'Trusted by' list (Microsoft, Skoda, O2, Mercedes-Benz, CSOB) is powerful—but are these direct clients or event agency clients? If they're end-clients, your messaging should emphasize 'We've performed for Fortune 500 companies' to event agencies. If they're agency referrals, lead with that instead. Which is it?
2. Persona 1 (Event Manager) is your primary recommender, but Persona 2 (Creative Director) is final decision-maker. Your 90-Day Action Plan targets both equally via LinkedIn + email. Should we weight outreach 60/40 toward Creative Directors first, since they approve budgets?
3. Your DACH region is Tier 2, but it's 3 countries. Want to split it—prioritize Germany (largest market) first, then Austria/Switzerland? Or test all three equally in Phase 1?
llm_outputs.notes: New behavior vs baseline-001: AI proactively asked strategy-refining questions after extraction. Questions are smart and relevant. But no extraction summary was shown (what was extracted: industries, geography, company size, etc.). The questions are unnecessarily clarifying -- could have been answered from the strategy text.

steps.notes: Improvements: (1) Toast notification 'Strategy data extracted successfully' now appears (was silent in baseline-001). (2) AI asks 3 follow-up questions after extraction (proactive behavior). Still missing: extraction summary showing what was extracted. Phase 2 Contacts still shows 'Coming soon'. No auto-advance to contacts phase (BL-114).

errors.description: AI column mapping results not applied to dropdowns -- all fields default to '-- Skip --' despite showing 'high' confidence. User must manually map all 7 columns.
Preview step returns 500 Internal Server Error from /api/imports/{id}/preview
errors.recovery: Could not recover -- import not completed through UI

steps.notes: MAJOR PROGRESS: Column mapping UI no longer crashes (BUG-001 from baseline-001 FIXED). The 3-step wizard renders fully. However: (1) AI mapping results don't populate the dropdowns (all show Skip), requiring manual mapping of all 7 columns. (2) Sample Values column is empty. (3) Preview step returns 500 error. Net: UI crash fixed but end-to-end import still not functional through UI. Contacts already exist from baseline-001 test.

errors.description: Cross-namespace filter leakage: enrichment page shows tag 'batch-2-NL-NORDICS[OPS/FIN]' from visionvolve namespace while in unitedarts namespace
Console errors: 500 on /api/enrich/staging-status and /api/enrich/estimate due to wrong tag filter
errors.recovery: Would need to select correct tag

steps.notes: DAG visualization comprehensive with 10 stages. Run button now shows 'Run 10 stages' (improved from baseline-001 'Loading...' state -- BL-148 partially fixed). Cross-namespace filter leakage still present (BL-142 not fixed). Did not execute enrichment (real credits). Namespace dropdown showed 'visionvolve' on this page despite URL being unitedarts (regression).
UNTESTED - requires L1 enrichment data. Triage stage exists in DAG (zero-cost, rules-based). No ICP criteria appear pre-loaded from strategy extraction (BL-139 untested).
UNTESTED - requires L1 + triage. All stages visible in DAG.
UNTESTED - blocked by no enrichment data. Campaigns page loads with 'New Campaign' button and clean empty state. Feature confirmed present.
UNTESTED - blocked by no reviewed messages.

AI column mapping results not applied to dropdowns (all default to Skip)

Namespace dropdown shows visionvolve on enrich page despite unitedarts URL
fixed_errors: Import column mapping UI no longer crashes (BUG-001 from baseline-001 FIXED)
Enrichment Run button now shows 'Run 10 stages' instead of stuck 'Loading...' (BL-148 improved)

basic-enrichment (Run button now functional instead of Loading...)

metadata.notes: Baseline-002 run against Sprint 5 build. Same test subject and contacts as baseline-001. Strategy already existed from baseline-001 (tested update flow rather than creation from scratch). 10 contacts already present from baseline-001 import. Steps 5-10 untested (same reason as baseline-001: no enrichment execution). Key improvements: strategy auto-execution, extraction toast, import UI crash fixed. Key regressions: import preview 500 error, AI mapping not applied to dropdowns.
